rationale: Adding public DecimalEncoder/DecimalDecoder API classes; convenience improvement, not a spec rule violation.

Retry attempts mutate and republish same command SON; acknowledged minimal user impact, no specific spec rule violated.
Security fix: user data leaked in InvalidDocument error message; internal security issue, not a spec conformance bug.
Spec explicitly requires retry to use same implicit session; driver uses a different session on retry attempt.

Memory leak in C extension when raising InvalidDocument; internal resource management bug, no spec rule involved.
Incorrect type annotation list[str] on distinct methods; type hint bug, no spec-defined behavior violated.
Transient ServerSelectionTimeoutError in user app; resolved Done with no driver fix, user support/env issue.

Improve BSON decoding error message with more detail; UX improvement, no spec rule involved.

pk option documented but not implemented; API ergonomics bug, custom primary key factory not a spec-covered area.
